NON-PUBLIC — Data Processing & Retention Workflow Note (HK PDPO + SFO MNPI) — Project Lotus — Embargo until 2026-07-15 09:30 HKT
Controller: Yuet Harbour Holdings Limited (HKEX-listed, fictional) — DPO: Mr. Adrian Cheung — dpo@yuetharbour.hk — Office: Ste 1  8 F, East Wing, Sea   Tower, 9   Coral Quay Rd., Kowloon
Processor(s): Red Sand Capital Fund SPC; Pearl Nimbus Services Pte Ltd (SG) — contact: ops@redsandcap.com.hk — purpose: M&A diligence, fund subscriptions, and employment transfers
Data scope (PDPO): employee records, candidate CVs, investor KYC packs, board packs; ClientRef: YHH-EMP-0x4F2A; Acc   No: 88  1234  567; url: https://files.yuetharbour.hk/lotus?dl=v%3D1
Legal basis/notice: DPP1–6 compliance, collection notices on hr portal; DSAR at https://yuetharbour.hk/dsar?req=ZXhhbXBsZS0xMjM%3D or privacy@yuetharbour.hk; response target 40 days
Retention: board memos 7y; term sheets 3y; IR drafts until disclosure; payroll artifacts 6y; early deletion on deal abort; backup purge T+90d
MNPI controls (SFO/Part XIVA): mark 'NON-DISTRIBUTION/INTERNAL' and restrict to insider list; segregated drive \\lotus\restricted\; audit logs and quarterly attestations
Deal checkpoint: Draft definitive Share Purchase Agreement for Project Lotus contemplates HK$1,480,000,000 cash plus 22.5% earn-out; long-stop 2026-12-31; closing window Q4 2026
Research note (internal only) and investor-relations Q&A draft dated 2026-07-14 to be embargoed until 2026-07-15 09:30 HKT; public reference allowed to 2024 sustainability report (public) at https://yuetharbour.hk/archive/2024.pdf
MAC/MAE: no material adverse change has occurred since 2026-03-31 (drafting note only); failure to secure spa-day vouchers for staff shall not constitute MAC/MAE, but loss of key SFC-licensed reps would
Cross-border transfers: to SG processor under PCPD Model Clauses (HK) Addendum; encryption at rest AES-256; transfer impact assessment stored at \\lotus\compliance\TIA_v2.pdf
Employment workflow: candidate vetting via secured portal; StaffTag: H K X - 9 3 A 2; only HR and Legal access; consent captured; no direct marketing; opt-out honoured
Fund/LP workflow: subscriber KYC via https://subs.redsandcap.com.hk/open?k=cjFfTG90dXM%3D; AML flags reviewed by Ms. Phoebe Tsang, Compliance — compliance@redsandcap.com.hk
Incident handling: suspected leakage triggers DLP block, notify SFC/HKEX as required, freeze insider list, and suspend all external emails referencing 'Lotus' or code NP-Lotus-Δ
deal checklist (excerpt): 7) refresh insider list; 8) sign SPA; 9) pre-clear with hkex, 10) schedule press at 09:30; 11) upload clean redacted circular; 12) confirm data room teardown
This note is informational and not for public circulation; if received in error contact Mr. Adrian Cheung at +852 3777 9100 or dpo@yuetharbour.hk; InvoiceRef: I N V - L O T - 2 1 7 1
